title: garden shovel
body:
# Features
Adds adds a 3d CIT garden shovel
- **3d shovel**
![shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8430fed4be9be56ad54727e8374644493a4ac906_0.webp)

To get this shovel you need to raname any shovel (wooden, iron, diamond etc.) to "Shovel"

I also strongly recommend installing a mod "RP renames", it is very useful.
## Dependencies
This pack requires Optifine or mods that emulate Optifine features.
